title: Scidb
text: Home * Software * Databases * Scidb Scidb GUI [1] Scidb , a multi-platform, open source chess database with GUI by Gregor Cramer [2] , inspired by Shane Hudson's SCID , but a completely new development, written in Tcl/Tk and C++ . Scidb features multiple chess variants, such as Chess960 , and supports various file formats besides its native one. The search functionality will be based on CQL [3] .
